HGSS.614.0000:
Pryce is a veteran who has trained
Pokémon for some 50 years.\f
As you’ll find, his attacks will make
you shiver in this freezing Gym.\f
Are you ready to be frozen solid?\f
I mean--keep up a hot fighting spirit
against ice!
HGSS.614.0001:
Pryce is something, but you’re
something else!\f
That was a hot battle that
spanned the generations!
HGSS.614.0003:
Mahogany Town Pokémon Gym\f
Leader: Pryce
Certified Trainer!\r
